title: Onboarding -  Permission for location tracking accepted [Android]
scenario: After accepting location permission via "Enable now" and "Allow" pop-up, the Poly Lens app should not re-prompt for location permissions when accessing the FindMyDevice menu later.
steps: Open the Poly Lens app on Android.
Tap the 'Enable now' button when prompted for location permission.
Tap 'Allow' on the permission pop-up to grant location tracking.
Proceed through the remaining onboarding steps.
expected: The app should allow location tracking and proceed with further onboarding steps. When the user later accesses the FindMyDevice menu, the app should not ask for permissions again.
